subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-22 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Faithfulness is a good attribute.  There is nothing better than faithfulness.  Although the faithfulness of the dog is natural
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @free will and predestination; fate, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
